title: 3D Ladders & Rails
description: A simple pack that makes ladders and rails 3D while keeping the vanilla feel and texture
body:
## 3D Ladders & Rails
This resource pack adds a simple yet effective 3D look to rails and ladders while still keeping that vanilla style and feel that looks good for any use case.
_The models have been made in a way to combat any z fighting which may be present in similar packs_
![All new 3D rails](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fab5064e3bd74e1839a4edf0ae3f319aa506a0c.png)
